source_name: Academic Citations and Media References Dataset
headline: Dataset overview
description: This dataset contains normalized citation and reference records connected to Samuel & Audrey Media Network projects, including travel media, finance research, tourism campaigns, public profiles, awards, and academic or research-oriented references.
interpretation_note: This overview describes the dataset package and is not itself an external citation record.
title: Dataset overview

headline: Normalization and interpretation
description: The dataset normalizes 61 source-linked references into consistent JSONL and CSV records. It separates academic, media, tourism, finance, award, profile, and public reference records without treating all source types as equivalent.

metadata.normalization_note: Legacy labels from earlier internal files were replaced with plain descriptive dataset language.

interpretation_note: Users should evaluate the reliability and relevance of each source individually.
title: Normalization and interpretation
